# Project Guidelines

## Conventions

- Be brief by default in this repo.
- Prefer short summaries and focused edits over long explanations.
- When adding research, recommendations, or factual claims, include sources when reasonably available.
- Avoid relying on a single source for research or recommendations when multiple reputable sources are available.
- Prefer reputable sources and summarize them concisely.
- Include pictures or diagrams when they are relevant and materially improve clarity.
- Keep docs split into small, topic-based files when that improves readability.
- Distinguish clearly between factual guidance, personal preference, and subjective sound-character descriptions.
- Tailor recommendations to budget, room, placement, and use case instead of giving generic audiophile advice.
- Prefer practical upgrades and setup changes before expensive tweaks or accessories.
- Call out when prices, availability, or value judgments may vary by market or timing.
